name: Lily
extractionNotes: Every skill (plot, clash, and ultimate) is preceded on the card by a target icon from icons.json skillIcons: skill_self, skill_friendly, skill_area, or skill_enemy. Stored as the skillIcon field.

Skill range / accuracy / damage are stored only in statProfiles. Use figuresInHex "-" when the card shows a single stat row; use 1, 2, or 3 when multiple rows match follower figures in the hex (max 3).
Champion and follower stats always use plotSpeed and clashSpeed (never a single speed field), even when both values are the same.
Follower stats are plotSpeed, clashSpeed, dodge, protection, and health from the stat row on the follower card. Unit count (top-right icon) is stored separately as units.
If card text says "Must target a follower" or "Must target a champion", remove it from text and store as mustTarget (follower, champion, or -).
Icon-only boon effects: skill_self → "Gain {boon_id}", skill_friendly → "Grant {boon_id}". Icon-only blight or "Hit Effect:" blight → "Inflict {blight_id}".

factionTrait.name: Shaper Champion
factionTrait.text: A shaper moves the turn token +1 step when they make a claim action.

uniqueTraits.name: Touch of the Fae
uniqueTraits.text: After one of her actions, Lily may place a status effect token of her choice in an adjacent empty hex. When a model enters a hex with a token, move it onto them after they end their movement.

ultimate.name: Thorn Wall
ultimate.text: Remove any number of Thornlings from the battlefield and place them on objective hexes within range. Thornlings on objective hexes cannot make advance actions or be moved by enemy skills.

plotSkills.name: Earth Call
plotSkills.text: Move one objective hex within range 1 hex onto an empty non-objective hex. Models on the objective hex move with it.

plotSkills.name: Breath of the Earth
plotSkills.text: Place a status effect token of your choice in an empty hex within range. When a model enters a hex with a token, move it onto them after they end their movement.

clashSkills.name: Nature's Visage
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move each friendly and enemy model in hexes adjacent to the target up to 1 hex away from the target.

clashSkills.name: Haunting Melody
clashSkills.text: Hit Effect: Move all models in the target's hex up to 2 hexes.

traits.name: Overgrowth
traits.text: When the Thornlings make a recruit action, you may recruit one, two, or three Thornlings to the hex.

plotSkills.name: Deep Roots
plotSkills.text: Remove any number of Thornlings from the battlefield. Then take a recruit action for each Thornling this skill removed from the battlefield.

clashSkills.name: Nature's Wrath
clashSkills.text: If the hit roll total equals the target's {dodge} exactly, this skill has +3 {damage}.
